3023760.name: Pentaquin: Deeds of Twilight - Soundtrack
3023760.description:
Immerse yourself in the hauntingly beautiful soundscape of “Pentaquin: Deeds Of Twilight” with the official soundtrack DLC. Composed by the Christian Mietke, Lars Grages, Christian Rüschoff and featuring vocals from Vanessa Strauch, this soundtrack perfectly captures the dark, atmospheric essence of Pentaquin, enhancing your journey through its perilous and magical world.

Experience the music that brings the rugged lands and twilight conflicts of Pentaquin to life. Each track is crafted to accompany you on your adventure as Eolan Elumor, the young light mage striving to save his sister Lyria from a dark fate. This soundtrack DLC includes all the evocative and powerful music from the game, allowing you to relive the epic battles, mysterious landscapes, and emotional moments whenever you like.

Whether you’re exploring the hand-drawn world of Pentaquin or simply enjoying the music on its own, this soundtrack DLC is a must-have for any fan of the game. Enhance your auditory experience and dive deeper into the mystical and dark world of Pentaquin.

Thank you for supporting “Pentaquin: Deeds Of Twilight”! If you enjoyed the game and its music, don’t forget to leave a review and share your experience with others.
